site.name: Sassany
site.description: Build your AI SaaS product in a weekend

hero.title: Ship Your AI SaaS Product Fast
hero.subtitle: A production-ready Next.js template with authentication, payments, AI integration, and everything you need to launch your SaaS product.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Built with a modern tech stack so you can focus on your product, not your infrastructure.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: Secure user authentication with email/password, magic links, and OAuth providers via Better Auth.

payments.title: Payments
payments.description: Stripe integration for one-time payments and recurring subscriptions with a full billing portal.

ai.title: AI Integration
ai.description: Vercel AI SDK pre-configured with streaming chat, completions, and tool-calling support out of the box.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Full i18n support with next-intl. Easily add new locales and serve a global audience from day one.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: A polished, accessible admin dashboard with data tables, charts, and settings pages ready to customize.

seo.title: SEO Ready
seo.description: Metadata API, Open Graph, structured data, and sitemap generation configured so you rank from the start.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free and scale as you grow. No hidden fees.
